subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the love of God! Thy letter hath been received. The matter concerning the postponement of My coming to America is without foundation. I am determined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب محبت الله نامه تو رسید قضیه تعویق آمدن بامریک بی اساس است من عازم
subcodes.subjects: @Theosophy, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
